cookieAuth.description: Session cookie required for most endpoints.
cookieAuth.name: auth_token

info.description: Machine Learning Competition Platform — REST + SSE Endpoints
info.title: LavBench API

get.summary: List all system backups with filenames, sizes, and timestamps.

post.summary: Trigger an immediate manual backup of the database and uploaded files.

get.summary: Stream backup events in real-time via Server-Sent Events.

delete.summary: Delete a manual backup file. Auto-backups cannot be deleted.

get.summary: Download a specific backup archive file.
List competition lifecycle backups for a specific challenge.
Download a competition lifecycle backup file.
Generate and download a CSV of all competitor scores for a challenge.
Download all completed student submissions as a ZIP archive.

post.summary: Generate new passwords for all competitors in a challenge.

get.summary: Inspect the dead letter queue of permanently failed submission evaluations.

post.summary: Bulk import competitors from a CSV file.

get.summary: List all built-in evaluation metrics available for task configuration.

post.summary: Register a new competitor with auto-generated credentials.
Register a new user account with specified role and demographics.

get.summary: List and search users with pagination. Supports filtering by role and challenge.

delete.summary: Permanently delete a user and all their submissions.

put.summary: Update user profile fields. Jury members have restricted edit access.

post.summary: Generate a new random password for a specific user.

get.summary: Get detailed worker cluster statistics including CPU, RAM, GPU specs.
Stream real-time worker cluster statistics via Server-Sent Events.

get.description:
Returns the token in the response body and sets it as a non-httpOnly cookie.
The frontend should read the cookie and include it as X-CSRF-Token header.
get.summary: Get a CSRF token for state-changing requests.

post.description:
Password must be sent as plaintext; the server hashes it.
Sets httpOnly cookie `auth_token` on success.
Rate limited: 5 failed attempts per username+IP per 60 seconds.

429.description: Rate limited (5 failures per 60s per username+IP)

post.summary: Authenticate a user and receive a session cookie.

200.description: Logged out successfully. Cookie cleared, token revoked.

post.summary: Log out the current user. Clears the httpOnly cookie and revokes the JWT token.

get.description: Requires valid httpOnly cookie or Authorization header.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing, expired, or revoked token

404.description: User not found (deleted after token was issued)

get.summary: Get the current authenticated user's profile.
List all available challenges with their tasks and stages.

post.summary: Create a new competition with start/end times, resource limits, and privacy settings.

post.description: Creates challenge, stages, and tasks. File attachments are NOT restored.
post.summary: Import a challenge configuration from JSON (previously exported via /export).

delete.summary: Permanently delete a challenge including all its tasks, submissions, and competition backups.

get.summary: Get detailed information about a specific challenge.

put.summary: Update the configuration of an existing challenge.

post.summary: Toggle archive state. Archived challenges are hidden from competitors.

get.description: File attachments (baseline notebooks, evaluator scripts) are NOT included.
get.summary: Export a challenge configuration as JSON, including tasks and stages.
Export comprehensive competition results as CSV with ranks, scores, and audit log.

post.summary: Finalize the competition scores. Locks rankings and reveals competitor identities.

get.description: Competitors only see their own challenge, and frozen/finalized rules apply.
get.summary: Get the leaderboard for a specific challenge.
Stream live updates to the challenge leaderboard using Server-Sent Events (SSE).

post.summary: Save manual points for a user in a challenge.

post.description: 5MB file limit. Returns a list of cell objects with type and source.

400.description: Invalid file type, file too large, or parse error

post.summary: Upload and parse a Jupyter Notebook (.ipynb) to preview cells.
Add a new stage to a challenge with its own deadline and score visibility rules.

delete.summary: Remove a stage from a challenge.

post.summary: Finalize a specific stage. Locks stage scores.

get.summary: Get paginated submissions for a challenge.

post.summary: Submit parsed code cells for a task.
Create a new evaluation task with resource limits, metrics, and test data files.
Create a test competition that starts immediately for testing purposes.

get.summary: Get the admin documentation guide.
Get the jury documentation guide.
Get the student documentation guide.

get.description: Verifies database, Redis, Celery, and disk availability.
get.summary: Health check for Docker and load balancer monitoring.
Get details of a specific submission.

post.summary: Select a submission as the final one for scoring.

delete.summary: Remove a task and all its submissions from a challenge.

get.summary: API endpoint.

put.summary: Update an existing task configuration including files and evaluator scripts.

get.summary: Download a resource file attached to a task.
Get cached leaderboard data for a specific task.
Stream live task leaderboard updates via SSE.
List submissions for a specific task with pagination.
Stream live task submission updates via SSE.

post.summary: Submit code cells for execution under a specific task.

get.summary: Get current worker cluster health status with specs.
Stream worker cluster health status via SSE.
List all HuggingFace datasets used by active challenges for worker preloading.
List all active task configurations for worker image pre-building.

post.summary: Worker callback to report submission status and scores.

get.summary: Worker endpoint to securely download task resource files.
Worker endpoint to fetch the HuggingFace API key for a task.
